subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One hath, in all conditions, summoned the servants unto the Most Exalted Horizon and beseeched the All-Possessing, the Most High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم در جمیع احوال عباد را بافق اعلی دعوت نموده و از غنی متعال مسئلت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
